info.name: Zorvyn Finance API
info.description:
# Zorvyn Finance API

A high-performance, production-ready REST API for the Zorvyn Finance Dashboard. Built with **FastAPI + MongoDB + JWT**, it provides secure endpoints for managing financial records, computing analytics, and enforcing role-based access control (RBAC).

## Modules
| Module | Base Path | Description |
|--------|-----------|-------------|
| 🔐 Auth | `/api/v1/auth` | Registration & JWT login |
| 📋 Records | `/api/v1/records` | Full CRUD for financial data |
| 📊 Dashboard | `/api/v1/dashboard` | Aggregated analytics |
| 👤 Users | `/api/v1/users` | User & role management |

## Roles
| Role | Permissions |
|------|-------------|
| `admin` | Full access — create, update, delete records; manage users |
| `analyst` | Read access + monthly trends endpoint |
| `viewer` | Read-only access to records and basic dashboard |

## Base URL
| Environment | URL |
|-------------|-----|
| Local (Docker / Python) | `http://localhost:8000/api/v1` |
| Production | *(set your deployed URL here)* |

All endpoints are prefixed with `/api/v1`.

## Authentication

This API uses **JWT Bearer Token** authentication via OAuth2 Password Flow.

**Step 1 — Register** (first user becomes admin automatically):
`POST /api/v1/auth/register`

**Step 2 — Login** to get your token:
`POST /api/v1/auth/login` (form-urlencoded)

**Step 3 — Use the token** on all protected requests:
`Authorization: Bearer <your_access_token>`

> ⚡ The Login request has a built-in test script that automatically saves your token to `{{token}}` — no manual copy-paste needed.

## Rate Limits
| Endpoint | Limit |
|----------|-------|
| POST /auth/register | 3 req/min |
| POST /auth/login | 5 req/min |
| POST /records | 10 req/min |
| GET /records | 30 req/min |

request.description: Returns the current health status of the API. Used by Docker HEALTHCHECK directives, load balancer probes, and monitoring dashboards. **No authentication required.**

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: User registration and JWT authentication. The **Login** request automatically saves the JWT to `{{token}}` via a test script — all subsequent requests are ready to use immediately.

request.description:
Create a new user account. The **first user registered** in a fresh system is automatically promoted to `admin`. All subsequent users default to `viewer`.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `email` | string | ✅ | Unique email address |
| `password` | string | ✅ | Minimum 8 characters |
| `full_name` | string | ✅ | Display name |

### Response Codes
| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| `201` | User created successfully |
| `400` | Email already registered |
| `429` | Rate limit exceeded (3/minute) |

response.name: 400 Bad Request - Email Taken

exec: console.log("❌ Login failed. Token NOT saved. Status:", pm.response.code);

request.description:
Authenticate with email and password to receive a JWT access token. Uses **OAuth2 Password Flow** — body must be `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`.

> ⚡ **Auto-Token Script**: A test script on this request automatically extracts and saves `access_token` to `{{token}}`. All other requests will use it immediately.

### Request Body (form-urlencoded)
| Field | Value | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `username` | your email | OAuth2 convention — send email here |
| `password` | your password | Plaintext |

### Response Codes
| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| `200` | Success — JWT returned |
| `401` | Invalid email or password |
| `403` | Account is deactivated |
| `429` | Rate limit exceeded (5/minute) |

item.name: 📋 Records
item.description:
Full CRUD for financial records with pagination, filtering, and search.

**Role Requirements:**
- `POST`, `PUT`, `DELETE`: Admin only
- `GET`: All authenticated roles

request.description:
Create a new financial record. **Admin only.**

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `amount` | float | ✅ | Monetary value (currency-agnostic) |
| `type` | enum | ✅ | `"income"` or `"expense"` |
| `category` | string | ✅ | E.g. `"salary"`, `"rent"`, `"utilities"` |
| `date` | ISO 8601 | ✅ | Date of the transaction |
| `notes` | string | ❌ | Optional description |

### Response Codes
| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| `201` | Record created |
| `401` | Missing or invalid JWT |
| `403` | Not an admin |
| `429` | Rate limit (10/minute) |

query.description: Regex search on notes and category

request.description:
Paginated list of financial records. All authenticated users can call this.

### Query Parameters
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `page` | int | `1` | Page number |
| `page_size` | int | `20` | Items per page (max 100) |
| `type` | enum | — | `income` or `expense` |
| `category` | string | — | Exact category filter |
| `date_from` | datetime | — | Start of date range |
| `date_to` | datetime | — | End of date range |
| `search` | string | — | Regex search on notes/category |
| `include_deleted` | bool | `false` | Show soft-deleted (Admin only) |

All filter params are **disabled by default** — enable in the Params tab as needed.

Fetch a specific financial record by its MongoDB ObjectId.

### Path Variables
| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `record_id` | MongoDB ObjectId (copy from Create or List response) |

### Response Codes
| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| `200` | Record found |
| `404` | Record not found |
| `401` | Unauthorized |

Update an existing record. **Admin only.** All body fields are optional but **at least one must be provided**.

### Request Body (all optional, min 1 required)
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `amount` | float | New amount |
| `type` | enum | `"income"` or `"expense"` |
| `category` | string | New category |
| `date` | datetime | New transaction date |
| `notes` | string | New notes |

### Response Codes
| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| `200` | Updated successfully |
| `400` | No fields provided |
| `404` | Record not found |
| `403` | Not an admin |

Soft-deletes a record by setting `is_deleted: true`. **Admin only.**

> ⚠️ **This is NOT a hard delete.** The record stays in MongoDB for audit purposes. Use `include_deleted=true` on the List endpoint to view soft-deleted records.

### Response Codes
| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| `204` | Deleted (no body returned) |
| `404` | Record not found |
| `403` | Not an admin |

item.name: 📊 Dashboard
item.description:
Analytics endpoints powered by MongoDB Aggregation Pipelines. All computations happen at the database level for maximum performance.

**Role Requirements:**
- `summary`, `category-breakdown`, `recent-activity`: All authenticated roles
- `monthly-trends`: Analyst and Admin only

request.description:
High-level financial KPIs computed entirely via a MongoDB aggregation pipeline.

### Response Fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `total_income` | float | Sum of all income records |
| `total_expenses` | float | Sum of all expense records |
| `net_balance` | float | `total_income - total_expenses` |
| `total_records` | int | Count of all non-deleted records |

Groups records by `category` and `type`, returning totals per group sorted by amount descending.

### Query Parameters
| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `type` | enum | Optional: `income` or `expense` |

### Response (array)
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `category` | string | Category name |
| `type` | string | `income` or `expense` |
| `total_amount` | float | Sum of amounts in this group |
| `count` | int | Number of records in this group |

query.description: Number of months to look back (default: 12)

request.description:
Month-by-month income/expense breakdown. **Analyst and Admin only.**

### Query Parameters
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `months_back` | int | `12` | How many months of history to return |

### Response (array)
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `year` | int | Calendar year |
| `month` | int | Month (1–12) |
| `income` | float | Total income that month |
| `expense` | float | Total expenses that month |
| `net` | float | `income - expense` |

> ⚠️ **Viewers receive `403 Forbidden`** on this endpoint.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - Viewers Blocked

query.description: Max records to return (server hard-caps at 50)

request.description:
Returns the most recently created non-deleted records sorted newest first.

### Query Parameters
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `limit` | int | `10` | Max results (server caps at 50) |

item.name: 👤 Users
item.description: User management endpoints. All authenticated users can view their own profile via `/me`. All other operations are Admin only.

request.description:
Returns the authenticated user's own profile data extracted from the JWT.

### Response Fields
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `id` | string | MongoDB ObjectId |
| `email` | string | User's email |
| `full_name` | string | Display name |
| `role` | enum | `admin`, `analyst`, or `viewer` |
| `is_active` | bool | Account status |
| `created_at` | datetime | Account creation time |
Returns all users sorted by creation date (newest first). **Admin only.**

Promote or demote a user's role. **Admin only.**

### Path Variables
| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `user_id` | MongoDB ObjectId of the target user |

### Request Body
| Field | Allowed Values |
|-------|----------------|
| `role` | `"admin"`, `"analyst"`, `"viewer"` |

> ⚠️ An admin **cannot demote themselves** — returns `400`.

Activate or deactivate a user account. **Admin only.**

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `is_active` | bool | `true` to activate, `false` to deactivate |

> ⚠️ An admin **cannot deactivate themselves** — returns `400`.
> Deactivated users receive `403 Forbidden` on login.

variable.description: Base URL. Change to your deployed server address if not running locally.
JWT — auto-populated by the Login request test script.
Set to a record 'id' from Create or List Records response.
Set to a user 'id' from List All Users response.
